description_long: This is a rectangular book with a light gray cover featuring playful, hand-drawn artwork and text in shades of red and pink. The front cover displays two pixelated figures, one with dark hair and the other with light hair, standing close together, suggesting a theme of friendship or affection. The background is mostly plain, with the exception of the colorful, stylized title text above the figures. The back cover features a large pink heart in the upper left corner, a block of wavy red lines resembling handwritten notes, and the word 'LOVE' in the lower right. Both spines are decorated with wavy red lines on a pink background, with no visible text. The book appears to be a standard hardcover or paperback, likely made of paper and cardboard, and is sized for easy carrying.
description: A light gray book with playful red and pink artwork, featuring two pixelated figures on the front and a heart with wavy lines on the back. The spines are pink with red squiggles, and the overall design is whimsical and youthful.
description_view_0: The front cover shows two pixelated figures standing together beneath large, colorful title text in red and pink.
description_view_1: The left spine is pink with vertical wavy red lines, lacking any visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover features a large pink heart, wavy red lines, and the word 'LOVE' in the lower right corner.
description_view_3: The right spine mirrors the left, with pink background and vertical wavy red lines, also without text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration depicts two pixelated, cartoon-like figures standing close together, rendered in a blocky, digital art style. The background is plain, emphasizing the figures and the playful, colorful design elements. The overall style is whimsical and youthful.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is pink with vertical wavy red lines running its length, and no visible text or decorative elements. The design is simple and matches the playful theme of the cover.
